calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Scott Sachs, Esq. of Atkinson, Andelson, Loya, Ruud & Romo, T:562.653.3200, for defendants, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment, as follows:

The motion by Plaintiff Anthony E. Held, Ph.D., P.E. to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed, and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

The Court signed the proposed order and consent judgment included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
